question: The chart displays the number of working days lost over several years due to industrial actions worldwide. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: 2013-14 has more lost working days than 2008-09.
options.B: 2009-10 has the highest number of lost working days among the years shown.
options.C: 2014-15 has roughly six times as many lost working days as 2013-14.
options.D: 2011-12 has more lost working days than 2012-13.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
